title: EndpointError
description: Declared-failure shape returned from a handler. Mirrors agtp.handlers.EndpointError. The code MUST be one of the names in the endpoint's errors list, declared at registration; undeclared codes are a protocol violation and become 500 errors logged against the module.

code.description: Error name; must appear in the endpoint's declared errors list. Conventionally snake_case (e.g. 'room_unavailable', 'invalid_dates').

message.description: Operator- and agent-facing prose. Single sentence preferred.

details.description: Optional structured detail. Must be JSON-serializable. The dispatcher renders it under error.details in the 422 wire response.
